sprint_goal: Empty repo → Docker stack boots → https://openfamhub.local/api/health returns 200

agent_instructions.role: You are a senior full-stack engineer building OpenFamHub from scratch. You write complete, production-quality code. Never produce stubs or TODO placeholders — every file you create must be fully functional. Work through tasks in the exact order listed. A task marked is_blocker:true must have all acceptance_check commands passing before you proceed to the next task. After each task run the commands in acceptance_check before marking it done.

python_environment.policy: ALL Python work must use the project virtual environment at backend/.venv. Never use the system Python or pip directly for project dependencies.
python_environment.verify_active: which python | grep .venv || echo 'ERROR: venv not active'
python_environment.rule: Before running ANY python, alembic, or pytest command, confirm the venv is active. If the shell prompt does not show (.venv), run the activate command first.
python_environment.docker_note: Docker containers have their own isolated Python environment via the Dockerfile — the .venv is for local development and CI only, not inside containers.

node_environment.policy: All Node/npm work runs from the frontend/ directory. node_modules are local to frontend/ — never install globally.
node_environment.rule: Always cd into frontend/ before running npm commands.

code_style.python: PEP8, type hints on all functions, async/await throughout, docstrings on public functions
code_style.typescript: strict mode, explicit return types, no any, functional components with hooks
code_style.general: no commented-out code, no TODO comments, no stubs, complete files every time

agent_instructions.file_rule: Always write the complete file. Never truncate. If a file already exists, read it first then write the full updated version.
agent_instructions.error_rule: All API endpoints must have try/except. All async DB operations wrapped. No unhandled exceptions reach the client.
agent_instructions.version_rule: The application version is stored in ONE canonical location: backend/app/core/config.py as APP_VERSION = '0.1.0'. The Dockerfile, README badge, and API health endpoint all read from this. Never hardcode the version string in more than one place.
agent_instructions.theme_default: dark — the <html> element ships with class='dark' by default. Users can toggle per-profile. Stored in users.settings_json.theme (light|dark).
agent_instructions.user_switch: Shared devices (wall, kitchen tablet) need a quick user-switch. NavShell must include a 'Switch User' button that shows the family member avatar grid and requires PIN to switch — without a full logout/login cycle.
agent_instructions.notifications: Backend must send both email (SMTP) and Discord webhook notifications for: sync job failures, backup job errors, and release announcements. Both channels are wired up via backend/app/services/notifications.py

stack.backend: Python 3.12 + FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + aiosqlite + Alembic + APScheduler + PyJWT + passlib[bcrypt]
stack.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + TanStack Query v5 + Zustand + React Router v6 + axios + vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox + react-big-calendar + date-fns
stack.infra: Docker Compose v2 + Caddy 2 alpine + nginx:alpine (frontend prod) + Avahi mDNS
stack.ci: GitHub Actions AMD64 only (no QEMU, no ARM64)

key_decisions.calendar_sync: ICS feed URLs only. No OAuth. Sync upserts on external_uid. External always wins on conflict.
key_decisions.recurring_events: Fully expand recurring events to individual rows on import. 12-month rolling window.
key_decisions.colour_model: Colour on calendar_sources.color_hex. Filter chips per source not per person.
key_decisions.host: AMD64 Linux server. Pi is display-only device pointing at server.
key_decisions.repo: GitHub public. GHCR images. GitHub Actions CI.
key_decisions.dev_machine: Mac Intel + Docker Desktop. openfamhub.local via Bonjour.

context.db_pattern: UUID TEXT primary keys. All timestamps UTC. Soft deletes via is_deleted. WAL mode + foreign_keys=ON pragmas on connect.
context.auth_pattern: JWT in httpOnly SameSite=Strict cookie. get_current_user FastAPI dependency. PIN rate limit: 5 attempts per 60s window.
context.sync_pattern: APScheduler AsyncIOScheduler. Each calendar_source has sync_interval_hours. Sync job checks source.last_synced_at + interval on each scheduler tick. Upsert on (source_id, external_uid). Delete rows where external_uid no longer in feed.

repo_structure.backend/app/main.py: FastAPI app, lifespan hooks, CORS, routers, StaticFiles mount
repo_structure.backend/app/core/database.py: async engine, WAL+FK pragmas, get_db dependency
repo_structure.backend/app/core/security.py: JWT, bcrypt, get_current_user, require_role, PIN rate limiter
repo_structure.frontend/src/wall/: Wall display components (isolated, no auth guard)

env_vars.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL: Discord webhook URL for notifications. Create at: discord.com/developers/applications → your server → Integrations → Webhooks
env_vars.SMTP_PASSWORD: SMTP password or app-specific password. For Gmail generate at: myaccount.google.com → Security → App passwords
env_vars.SMTP_FROM: From address for notification emails e.g. homehub@gmail.com
env_vars.SMTP_TO: Recipient address for admin alerts e.g. your@email.com
env_vars.DATA_PATH: ./data  # Change to NAS mount point e.g. /mnt/nas/homehub
env_vars.APP_VERSION: 0.01  # Do not edit manually — updated by release checklist

execution_rules.rule_1: Complete tasks in the exact order listed. Do not start a task until all tasks in depends_on are verified passing.
execution_rules.rule_2: Tasks marked is_blocker:true must have all acceptance_check commands passing before you proceed.
execution_rules.rule_3: Write every file completely. No stubs, no truncation, no TODOs.
execution_rules.rule_4: After completing ALL tasks in this sprint, run the sprint_exit_verification commands below.

tasks.title: Git repo, directory structure, gitignore
shell_commands: git init && git add .gitignore && git commit -m 'chore: initial gitignore'
acceptance_check: git status | grep 'nothing to commit' || git log --oneline | grep 'initial gitignore'

files_to_create.spec: Docker Compose v2 (no top-level version key). Three services: api (build ./backend, expose 8000, env_file .env, bind mounts ./data/db:/data/db ./data/photos:/data/photos ./data/backups:/data/backups, restart unless-stopped), web (build ./frontend, expose 3000, restart unless-stopped), caddy (image caddy:2-alpine, ports 80:80 443:443, bind mounts ./config/Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile, named volumes caddy_data and caddy_config, restart unless-stopped). Named volumes section at bottom: caddy_data, caddy_config.

Document every env var with inline comments. FAMILY_NAME=My Family. TIMEZONE=America/New_York (with note: find yours at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones). SECRET_KEY=REPLACE_WITH_64_CHAR_HEX (with note: generate with openssl rand -hex 32, back this up in a password manager). DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:////data/db/homehub.db. ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://openfamhub.local. BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS=30. BACKUP_TIME=03:00. WALL_IDLE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=300.

tasks.title: FastAPI skeleton: config, database, main, health endpoint, Alembic init

files_to_create.spec: All packages listed in packages field above, each pinned with ==latest_stable. Also include pytest, pytest-asyncio, httpx as test dependencies (marked with # test comment).

pydantic-settings BaseSettings. Fields: family_name str default OpenFamHub, timezone str default UTC, secret_key str (required), database_url str default sqlite+aiosqlite:////data/db/homehub.db, allowed_origins str default https://openfamhub.local, backup_retention_days int default 30, backup_time str default 03:00, wall_idle_timeout_seconds int default 300. Config: env_file=.env, env_file_encoding=utf-8. Expose a cached settings singleton via get_settings() using @lru_cache and module-level settings = get_settings().

Create async SQLAlchemy engine from settings.database_url. Register a connect event listener on engine.sync_engine that executes PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON and PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL on every new connection. Create async_sessionmaker as AsyncSessionLocal. Define DeclarativeBase subclass as Base. Define async get_db generator that yields an AsyncSession, commits on success, rolls back on exception.

Implement: hash_password(password) using passlib bcrypt. verify_password(plain, hashed). create_access_token(user_id, expires_days=30) returns JWT string signed with settings.secret_key HS256. decode_token(token) returns payload dict, raises HTTPException 401 on any PyJWTError. PIN rate limiter using a module-level defaultdict(list) keyed by user_id storing timestamps — check_pin_rate_limit(user_id) raises HTTPException 429 if 5+ attempts in last 60 seconds. get_current_user FastAPI dependency: reads access_token from Cookie, decodes JWT, loads User from DB, raises 401 if missing/invalid/deleted. require_role(*roles) factory: returns a dependency that calls get_current_user and raises 403 if role not in roles.

FastAPI app with lifespan context manager. In startup: run alembic upgrade head programmatically (import Config and command from alembic), start APScheduler AsyncIOScheduler, register calendar sync job, register daily backup job. In shutdown: scheduler.shutdown(). Add CORSMiddleware using origins from settings.allowed_origins split by comma. Add global exception handler returning JSON 500. Mount StaticFiles at /photos pointing to /data/photos. Create /data/photos/originals /data/photos/avatars /data/photos/thumbnails /data/db /data/backups directories with exist_ok=True. Include all routers (auth, users, calendar, integrations, ws). Expose GET /api/health returning {status: ok, version: 0.1.0}. Set docs_url=/api/docs, openapi_url=/api/openapi.json.
Standard Alembic ini. script_location = alembic. Do not put sqlalchemy.url here — it is loaded dynamically in env.py.

Import Base from app.core.database and all model modules so metadata is populated. Load database URL from settings. Implement run_migrations_online using asyncio.run() with an async function that creates an async connection and calls context.run_migrations(). Implement run_migrations_offline for the offline case using settings.database_url.

FROM python:3.12-slim. WORKDIR /app. RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libheif-dev && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*. COPY requirements.txt . RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt. COPY . . CMD uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --workers 1

shell_commands: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && alembic init alembic
acceptance_check: source backend/.venv/bin/activate && python -c "import sys; print('venv:', sys.prefix)" | grep .venv && echo VENV_OK
curl -sk https://openfamhub.local/api/health | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['status']=='ok'" && echo PASS
docker compose logs api | grep 'Application startup complete' && echo PASS

tasks.title: React/Vite/TypeScript frontend skeleton + PWA manifest + Nginx + Dockerfile
shell_commands: cd frontend && npm install react-router-dom @tanstack/react-query axios zustand
cd frontend && npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer vite-plugin-pwa workbox-window @types/node
cd frontend && npm install react-big-calendar date-fns @use-gesture/react
python3 -c "from PIL import Image; [Image.new('RGB',(s,s),'#4F46E5').save(f'frontend/public/icons/icon-{s}.png') for s in [192,512,180]]" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Generate placeholder icons manually'

files_to_create.spec: content: ['./index.html','./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}']. darkMode: 'class'. Extend theme with colors: primary DEFAULT #4F46E5 dark #3730A3. fontFamily: extend with display for wall clock. Keep all other shadcn/ui defaults from init.

Import defineConfig from vite, react from @vitejs/plugin-react, VitePWA from vite-plugin-pwa. VitePWA config: registerType autoUpdate, includeAssets icons/*.png, manifest with name OpenFamHub short_name OpenFamHub theme_color #4F46E5 background_color #ffffff display standalone start_url / icons array (192 512 180 apple-touch-icon). workbox config: navigateFallback /index.html, navigateFallbackDenylist [/^\/api/, /^\/photos/], runtimeCaching with NetworkFirst for /api/auth/me /api/users /api/calendar/events /api/calendar/sources each with their own cacheName. server.proxy: /api to http://localhost:8000, /photos to http://localhost:8000.

Create axios instance with baseURL /api, withCredentials true, Content-Type application/json header. Add response interceptor: on 401 status, import useAuthStore dynamically, call clearUser(), redirect to /login via window.location.href. Export as apiClient.

Zustand store. User interface: id string, display_name string, role (admin|co_admin|teen|child|guest), color_hex string, ui_mode (standard|child|kiosk), avatar_type string, avatar_value string, family_id string. AuthStore: user User|null, setUser(user:User)=>void, clearUser()=>void. Export useAuthStore.
Wrap App in QueryClientProvider with QueryClient defaultOptions staleTime 60000 retry 1 refetchOnWindowFocus false. Mount to #root.

React Router BrowserRouter. Routes: /setup -> SetupWizard, /login -> Login, /dashboard -> Dashboard, /calendar -> CalendarPage, /wall -> WallLayout (no nav chrome), /admin/users -> ManageUsers, /admin/calendars -> CalendarSettings, /admin/settings -> AdminSettings, / redirect to /dashboard. On mount useEffect: call GET /api/auth/setup/status. If setup_complete false navigate /setup. Else call GET /api/auth/me. If 200 setUser and navigate /dashboard. If 401 navigate /login. Render OfflineBanner and InstallPrompt as global overlays above the router.

Multi-stage. Stage 1 FROM node:20-alpine AS build. WORKDIR /app. COPY package*.json ./. RUN npm ci. COPY . . RUN npm run build. Stage 2 FROM nginx:alpine. COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html. COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf. EXPOSE 3000.

acceptance_check: cd frontend && npm run build && echo BUILD_PASS
docker compose up -d --build web && curl -sk https://openfamhub.local | grep -i 'OpenFamHub\|root' && echo PASS

files_to_create.spec: Trigger on push to main. Two jobs. Job 1 'test': runs-on ubuntu-latest, steps: checkout, setup python 3.12, pip install requirements.txt pytest pytest-asyncio httpx, run pytest backend/tests/ -v. Job 2 'build': needs test, runs-on ubuntu-latest, permissions contents read packages write. Steps: checkout, login to ghcr.io with GITHUB_TOKEN, build-push-action for backend (context ./backend, platforms linux/amd64, push true, tags ghcr.io/vnmyers13/openfamhub/openfamhub-api:latest and :SHA, cache-from/to type=gha), build-push-action for frontend (same pattern). No QEMU step — AMD64 only.

sprint_exit_verification: All blocker tasks verified with acceptance_check commands
Sprint goal achieved: Empty repo → Docker stack boots → https://openfamhub.local/api/health returns 200
